title: Pastors
description: Pastors who are already ordained within JJNPC and strong pastoral trainee recommended by other senior pastors

title: Faith Workers
description: Believer who is an active faith worker of JJNPC with spiritual maturity of at least 5 years

title: Mature believers 5+
description: Mature believer who is long standing in faith for more than 5 years

title: Mature believers 3-5
description: Mature believer who is already walking in faith for around 3-5 years

title: Baby believers
description: New born believer who has recently come to faith and has spiritual maturity less than 3 years
